title: README showcase rewrite — agent team primary identity plus v2 before/after
text: Rewrote the top-level README to lead with the six-agent harness (PM / Architect / Engineer / Reviewer / QA / Designer) and v1/v2 homepage screenshots, demoted K-line prediction to supporting scope, added a Content-Alignment Gate to ai-collab-protocols, migrated prediction architecture content into agent-context/architecture.md, and cascaded the K-039 roles SSOT update through README plus protocol doc plus /about role cards.

title: PageHero shared component — responsive mobile type scale unifies Home/About/Diary H1
text: Extracted a PageHero shared component that renders a single <h1> with per-line span blocks, enforcing a 36px mobile / per-page desktop (56px /, 52px /about + /diary) type scale so the /about mobile Hero no longer overflows on long words like 'orchestrating'; Home, About, and Diary now share one heading primitive.

title: /diary mobile rail and marker restore via shared-component mobileVisible prop
text: K-041 closed — /diary mobile rail and marker restored via shared DiaryRail/DiaryMarker components with mobileVisible + borderRadius + topInset props; Homepage K-023/K-028 Sacred invariants preserved via explicit prop overrides.

title: Split SSOT for /about role cards
text: Split the role-card source of truth into two layers — Pencil owns visual, content/roles.json owns runtime text — with a sync generator and pre-commit hook that kill README/protocol doc drift without needing a Designer session.

title: Sitewide UI polish batch — Bodoni to Geist Mono reset plus 8 polish items
text: Sitewide font reset from Bodoni Moda / Newsreader to a single Geist Mono family with italic OFF across all routes, bundled with 8 UI polish items (Home padding parity, Diary footer spacing and mobile rail restore, /about protocol links open-in-new-tab, Hero mobile rhythm, Pencil GA backfill) and W-1/W-2/W-3 token semantic cleanup with zero runtime behavior change.

title: Favicon wiring and Web App Manifest
text: Wired the K-036 favicon assets and a minimal Web App Manifest into the HTML head, with a regression spec guarding asset availability and link-tag integrity.

title: About footer Pencil-SSOT unification
text: Retired the Footer variant prop and collapsed the component to the single Pencil-literal one-liner, so homepage, /about, and /business-logic now render byte-identical footers from one source.

title: Favicon design and rasterization
text: Designed a 4-candle golden-cross favicon with dual moving-average curves and rasterized it to the seven standard web and mobile formats.

title: NavBar hex-to-token refactor
text: Migrated UnifiedNavBar's hex literals to design-system tokens and upgraded navbar specs from brittle class-name regex to aria-current plus computed-color assertions.

title: About paper palette migration
text: Migrated the /about ArchPillarBlock and TicketAnatomyCard from dark-theme colors to the paper palette tokens, with added Playwright color-regression coverage.

title: GA4 SPA pageview hardening
text: Added Playwright coverage for SPA pageviews and the underlying HTTP beacon payload, logging follow-up tickets for a residual send-page-view gap.

title: Remove Built by AI showcase from /about
text: Removed the explanatory Built-by-AI showcase section from /about; the homepage banner stays.

title: README Future Enhancements roadmap
text: Grouped open tickets into three recruiter-facing categories — Design System, Analytics, Architecture — to surface roadmap thinking alongside shipped features.

title: Homepage structure alignment v2
text: Closed the remaining homepage v2 visual alignments: rectangular diary markers, STEP header bars on flow cards, and body padding aligned with the Pencil spec.

title: About structure alignment v2
text: Aligned /about to design v2 across twelve items (DossierHeader, SectionLabelRow, Hero pairing, Role Card labels, CASE FILE / LAYER headers) and migrated shared primitives to the paper palette.

title: Sitewide design system baseline
text: Shipped the sitewide paper palette and three-font system, migrated the NavBar, and extended HomeFooterBar across every route — unblocking the /about and homepage v2 tickets.

title: Automated visual report script
text: Added a visual-report script that auto-screenshots every route into an HTML report, with Playwright config split so the report and E2E suite run in isolation.

title: Early project phases and deployment setup
text: Stood up the FastAPI + React monorepo with a JWT-protected business-logic endpoint and a five-route SPA, shipped the 1H/1D forecast UI with MA99 trend filter, and deployed to Cloud Run plus Firebase Hosting.
